interfaces.name: SlotFX
interfaces.signalFlowRole: hot-swappable network slot (selects which compiled network to load)

interfaces.name: TableProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

interfaces.name: SliderPackProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

interfaces.name: AudioSampleProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

gaps.question: How does the time-variant modulator load and run a compiled network to produce a monophonic modulation signal?
gaps.context: The network must produce a continuous modulation signal.

gaps.question: How are compiled network parameters exposed? Are there any fixed parameters?
gaps.context: This module has no fixed parameters - all come from the network.

gaps.question: Does the modulator run at control rate (downsampled)?
gaps.context: Time-variant modulators typically run at control rate.

gaps.question: Does the module forward MIDI events to the compiled network?
gaps.context: Time-variant modulators normally do not receive MIDI, but the compiled network might need events.

gaps.question: How are Tables, SliderPacks, and AudioFiles from the compiled network exposed?
gaps.context: Complex data access for custom modulation shapes.

notes: This module has no fixed parameters. All parameters come from the loaded compiled network. Runs monophonically with single-channel output at control rate.
